scripts.test:server:docker: mkdir -p /tmp/docker-config /tmp/buildx && DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/docker-config BUILDX_CONFIG=/tmp/buildx docker build -f server/Dockerfile --target test .
scripts.smoke:server:docker: mkdir -p /tmp/docker-config /tmp/buildx && DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/docker-config BUILDX_CONFIG=/tmp/buildx docker build -f server/Dockerfile -t relayhub-server . && docker rm -f relayhub-smoke >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && docker run -d --name relayhub-smoke -p 18080:8080 relayhub-server && sleep 3 && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18080/healthz && curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer relayhub-local-key' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Relay-Session-ID: smoke-session' -d '{"model":"smart-fast","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"ping"}]}' http://127.0.0.1:18080/v1/chat/completions && curl -fsS -H 'Authorization: Bearer relayhub-admin' http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/admin/usage/summary && docker stop relayhub-smoke >/dev/null
scripts.check: npm run typecheck:console && npm run build:console && npm run test:server:docker
